reference: Hepatosplenomegaly with abdominal pain could possibly be due to any chronic infection, anemia, malaria, typhoid, kala-azar, liver problems such as hepatitis or portal hypertension, and many blood disorders. Kindly evaluate with blood tests after your physician's advice.
text: Hepatosplenomegaly with abdominal pain could possibly be due to any chronic infection, anemia, malaria, typhoid, kala azar, liver problems such as hepatitis or portal hypertension, and many blood disorders. Highly evaluate with blood tests after your physician's advice.
